definitions.text: det innerste rommet i Salomos tempel i Jerusalem, der paktens ark stod
definitions.translation: the innermost chamber of Solomon's Temple in Jerusalem, where the Ark of the Covenant stood

definitions.text: rom der det mest verdifulle oppbevares
definitions.translation: room where the most valuable is kept

examples.no: bli med inn i det aller helligste
examples.en: come with me into the innermost sanctum
